raw_consumer_statement:
A ) I bought two watches on XX/XX/year> from XXXX : XXXX wrist watch and XXXX wrist watch. Below is the transaction from my Citi bank credit card statement XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$650.00} ( XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) Note : According to XXXX, this watch to be delivered first, and XXXX did claim that it was delivered even though item was never received XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$480.00} ( XXXX XXXX  XXXX ) Note : According to XXXX this watch to be delivered couple days later than XXXX XXXX which they did delivered, but to a wrong address and a wrong person. Hence, I did not receive this watch as well. 
Note : XXXX refunded me {$480.00} on XX/XX/year> after I reached out to them for XXXX watch because they realized that the item was delivered to a wrong address. I have the proof and will attach along with this complain. 

D ) Now, the issue starts when I started dispute with Citi bank for Item not received regarding XXXX XXXX for {$650.00} Initially, Citi bank credited my credit card with temporary credit of {$650.00}. But when dispute was resolved, the letter tells me that dispute was resolved on my favor. But my credit card was credited with {$160.00} instead of full {$650.00}. Hence, I do not know where did my other credit of {$480.00} disappear because my card was only credited with {$160.00}.
